title: Rani Sati Temple
tagline: Rani Sati Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Rani Sati Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Jhunjhunu, Jhunjhunu district, in the state of Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Rani Sati Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Jhunjhunu, Jhunjhunu district, in the state of Rajasthan, India. It is the largest temple in India devoted to Rani Sati, a Rajasthani lady who lived sometime between the 13th and the 17th century and committed sati (self-immolation) on her husband's death. Various temples in Rajasthan and elsewhere are devoted to her worship and to commemorate her act. Rani Sati is also called Narayani Devi and referred to as Dadiji (grandmother).

topPlaces.name: Ambedkar Nagar, Jodhpur
topPlaces.description: Ambedkar Nagar is a village located in Phalodi Tehsil of Jodhpur district, Rajasthan, India. As of 2011 India census the Ambedkar Nagar had a population of 348 which 180 are males while 168 are females.

topPlaces.name: Sonasar
topPlaces.description: Sonasar is a village in Jhunjhunu District in Rajasthan, India. Sonasar is 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) north of Jhunjhunu.

topPlaces.name: Kalipahari
topPlaces.description: Kalipahari village is a big community of Shekhawat Rajputs in the Jhunjhunu District of Rajasthan. It is situated 5 km south of Bagar, Jhunjhunu.

items.note: Ambedkar Nagar is a village located in Phalodi Tehsil of Jodhpur district, Rajasthan, India. As of 2011 India census the Ambedkar Nagar had a population of 348 which 180 are males while 168 are females.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rani Sati Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rani Sati Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rani Sati Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jaipur International Airport (151 km) and the nearest railway station is Jaipur Junction (140 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rani Sati Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rani Sati Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rani Sati Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Rani Sati Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rani Sati Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ambedkar Nagar, Jodhpur, Sonasar, Kalipahari.
